passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 44-49): The President of a club is appointing officials - J, K, L, M, N, O, P, Q and R - to serve on five committees to study three different aspects of activities at the club. These are Games Committee, a Food Service Committee and an Entertainment Committee. Her appointments must respect the following: i) Each committee must have exactly three members, ii) No person can serve on more than one committee, iii) L must serve on the Entertainment Committee, iv) Q must serve on the same committee, v) J and K cannot serve on the same committee, vi) N cannot serve on the same committee as R, vii) O must serve on the same committee as K or Q or both A and Q.

Directions (Q. 50-54): Study the following information and answer the questions. There is a family of six persons, viz. A, B, C, D, E and F. They are Lawyer, Doctor, Salesman, Engineer and Accountant. There are two married couples in the family. D, the Salesman, is married to the Lady Teacher. The son of D and E is the Lawyer. F, the Accountant, is the son of B and brother of Lawyer. C, the Lady Teacher, is the daughter-in-law of A. E is the unmarried Engineer and A is grandmother of F.

Directions (Q. 55-59): Read the following information carefully and answer the questions that follow. A family consists of six members, viz. P, Q, R, S, T and U. T is the grandfather of R and is married to couples P and Q each having a nurse, one housewife and two students in the doctor, one contractor, one nurse, one housewife and two students in the family.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following groups could constitute the Games Committee?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If R is on the Entertainment Committee and K is on the Food Service Committee then which of the following must be true?

choices.a: O is on the Entertainment Committee.
choices.b: J is on the Games Committee.
choices.c: P is on the Food Service Committee.
choices.d: O is on the Games Committee.
choices.e: P is on the Games Committee.

questions.body: If Q serves on the Food service Committee and L serves on the same Committee as Q then which of the following must serve on the Games Committee?

questions.body: If J is assigned to the Food Service Committee and L is appointed to the Entertainment Committee, then which of the following must be true?
